articles.title: Markey presses Meta on facial recognition risks in smart glasses
articles.description:
Senators warn that the technology could threaten privacy and discourage public protest.

The post Markey presses Meta on facial recognition risks in smart glasses appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Senator Ed Markey questions Meta about facial recognition in smart glasses.
Markey highlights risks to privacy and public protest on March 21, 2026.
Concerns raised could affect Boston residents' safety and civil liberties.

articles.title: Debate in Quincy over funding for new firefighting gear after current gear tests positive for PFAS
articles.description:
Quincy's city council delayed a vote on a $2.65 million plan to replace firefighter gear that contains harmful chemicals.

The post Debate in Quincy over funding for new firefighting gear after current gear tests positive for PFAS appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Quincy's city council postponed a vote on $2.65 million firefighter gear funding.
Current gear tested positive for PFAS, raising health concerns for firefighters.
Delayed funding may prolong exposure risks for Quincy firefighters and impact public safety.

articles.title: The battle over the aging Attleboro Zoo is getting wild
articles.description:
City proposal would transform Capron Park Zoo into a nature reserve.

The post The battle over the aging Attleboro Zoo is getting wild appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: City plans to transform Capron Park Zoo into a nature reserve for wildlife conservation.
Proposal aims to enhance local biodiversity and attract more visitors to Attleboro.
Residents may see increased recreational opportunities and educational programs by 2026.

articles.title: BTS returns with comeback concert in Seoul after 4-year hiatus
articles.description:
The performance at Gwanghwamun Square launches a global tour spanning dozens of shows across the United States, Europe and Asia.

The post BTS returns with comeback concert in Seoul after 4-year hiatus appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: BTS launched a global tour with a concert in Seoul on March 21, 2026.
The tour includes dozens of shows across the U.S., Europe, and Asia.
Boston residents can expect BTS concerts in local venues as part of the tour.
